results.rendered_html:
dṛśīka (wie eben)
1〉 adj. ansehnlich, conspicuus  NIR. 10,8 . stomaṃ rudrāya dṛśīkam  ṚV. 1,27,10 .
— 2〉 n. das Ansichtigwerden, Ansehen: sūro dṛśīke  ṚV. 4,41,6 . 10,92,7 . navanta gāvaḥ sva1rdṛśīke 1,66,10 . (5). 69,10 . (5)
— Vgl. citra˚, durdṛśīka, sudṛśīkarūpa.

dṛśīka a. [dṛś karmaṇi bā˚ īṃkak]

— kā, -kaṃ Appearance, becoming manifest.
